name: Almond Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch square pan.
3. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt butter for both topping and batter.
4. Mix together 1/2 cup of melted butter and both sugars in a separate bowl.
5. Blend in egg yolks.
6. Stir in lemon juice and cream until thoroughly combined.
7. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into the sugar/yolk mixture and combine well.
8. Pour batter into the buttered baking pan and spread evenly with a rubber spatula.
9. Combine almonds, brown sugar, and lemon zest in a separate bowl.
10. Add remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the almond mixture and mix well.
11. Cover the batter evenly with the almond mixture.
12. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until edges pull away from the pan and a toothpick inserted comes out moist with crumbs clinging to it.
13. Do not overbake. Place on a rack to cool, then cut into squares.
Storing: Airtight for one week, freeze for two months.
